statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); project_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.project_dir'); project_name=$(basename "$project_dir"); context_size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size'); current_input=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // 0'); current_output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.output_tokens // 0'); cache_read=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.cache_read_input_tokens // 0'); current_total=$((current_input + current_output + cache_read)); current_k=$(awk -v total="$current_total" 'BEGIN {printf "%.0f", total / 1000}'); context_k=$(awk -v size="$context_size" 'BEGIN {printf "%.0f", size / 1000}'); model_colors=(31 32 33 36 91 92 96); model_color=${model_colors[$((RANDOM % ${#model_colors[@]}))]}; block_time=""; if command -v ccusage &> /dev/null; then ccusage_output=$(ccusage statusline 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ccusage_output" ]; then block_time=$(echo "$ccusage_output" | grep -oE '[0-9]+h [0-9]+m left' || echo "$ccusage_output" | grep -oE '[0-9]+m left' || echo ""); if [ -n "$block_time" ]; then block_time=$(printf " | \033[35m%s\033[0m" "$block_time"); fi; fi; fi; git_branch=""; if [ -d "$project_dir/.git" ]; then branch=$(cd "$project_dir" && git --no-optional-locks symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git --no-optional-locks rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then git_branch=$(printf " | \033[95m%s\033[0m" "$branch"); fi; fi; printf "\033[94m%s\033[0m%s | \033[%sm%s\033[0m | \033[93m%sk/%sk\033[0m%s" "$project_name" "$git_branch" "$model_color" "$model" "$current_k" "$context_k" "$block_time"
